results.rendered_html:
anuṣṇa (3. a + uṣṇa)
1〉 adj. f. ā.
a〉 nicht heiss: anuṣṇābhiraphenābhiradbhiḥ  M. 2,61 . kalt: anuṣṇaiḥ — ānandāśruvindubhiḥ  RAGH. 12,62 . Vgl. anuṣṇagu. [Page1-0225]
— b〉 apathisch, träge  AK. 2,10,19 .  H. 384 . Vgl. śītaka.
— 2〉 f. ˚ṣṇā N. eines Flusses  VP. 183  (im Index ˚ṣṇī).
— 3〉 n. N. einer Wasserlilie, Nymphaea coerulea (utpala),  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
anuṣṇa a.
1 Not hot, cold, chilly; anuṣṇairānaṃdāśrubiṃdubhiḥ  R. 12. 62. 
2 Apathetic; lazy, sluggish (alasa).
— ṣṇaḥ Cold touch or sensation.
— ṣṇā N. of a stream.
— ṣṇaṃ A waterlily, blue lotus (utpala).
Comp.
— guḥ (-go ray) having cold rays, the moon.
— vallikā N. of a plant nīladūrvā.
